title: Declare and verify PMTiles Content-Type
goal: Configure the public PMTiles route to emit one documented, client-compatible Content-Type for full and Range responses, and lock the contract with CI plus production readiness checks.

acceptance.assertion: The repository documents one explicit PMTiles Content-Type selected against current client and proxy compatibility.
acceptance.verifier: documented route contract and upstream compatibility references

acceptance.assertion: Both HTTP 200 and HTTP 206 responses for every regional .pmtiles path emit the chosen Content-Type together with Accept-Ranges and correct Content-Range.
acceptance.verifier: Caddy integration tests and public readiness receipt

acceptance.assertion: Hamburg and Schleswig-Holstein still decode and render through MapLibre after the header change.
Production headers for both stable aliases and versioned artifacts match the declared contract.

metadata.gap: Production currently serves valid PMTiles 200/206 bodies without an explicit Content-Type header. MapLibre works, but the HTTP representation contract is implicit.
